title: Crispy Spicy Canadian Tahini Fritters
description: These golden, crunchy fritters fuse the nutty richness of tahini with a fiery kick, inspired by classic Canadian poutine but with a vegan twist.

ingredients.name: tahini
ingredients.notes: use full‑fat tahini for best flavor

instructions: In a medium bowl whisk together chickpea flour, quinoa, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, and salt until dry.
Add tahini, maple syrup, sriracha, and water; stir until a thick, sticky batter forms. Let it rest for 5 minutes to thicken.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a skillet over medium heat (about 180°C/350°F). When the oil shimmers, drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, flattening slightly with the back of a spoon.
Cook 2–3 minutes on each side until golden and crisp, then transfer to a paper towel to drain excess oil.
Repeat with the remaining batter, adding more oil as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley or cilantro, and a squeeze of lime if desired. Enjoy as a spicy, energizing snack or appetizer.
